body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Move SIC TimeVaryingInput object and related updates out of the driver and into the `PrescribedIceSimulation` object. Also does some misc. cleanup of `PrescribedIceSimulation` that I found along the way.

first part of #1136 , to be followed by moving SST TimeVaryingInput out of driver

## To do
- [x] move SIC updates out of driver, into PrescribedIceSimulation
- [x] update tests to use new setup
- [x] check AMIP CI results
title: move SIC TimeVaryingInput into PrescribedIceSim
